mapper.select: SELECT dept_cd, dept_nm, up_dept_cd FROM DEPT WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND dept_nm != 'CEO' ORDER BY dept_nm ASC
SELECT e.emp_no, e.emp_nm, e.pos_cd, (SELECT pos_nm FROM POSITION_MST WHERE pos_cd = e.pos_cd) as posNm FROM EMP e WHERE e.dept_cd = #{deptCd} AND e.acnt_act_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY e.emp_nm ASC

where.if:
AND (
a.late_yn = 'Y'
OR a.out_dtm IS NULL
)

mapper.select:
SELECT a.attd_no , a.emp_no , e.emp_nm , p.pos_nm , d.dept_nm , a.work_dt , a.in_dtm , a.out_dtm , a.late_yn , a.attd_stat_cd , a.remark FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN EMP e ON a.emp_no = e.emp_no LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST p ON e.pos_cd = p.pos_cd LEFT JOIN DEPT d ON e.dept_cd = d.dept_cd
ORDER BY a.work_dt DESC, a.in_dtm DESC OFFSET (#{paging.page} - 1) * #{paging.recordSize} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{paging.recordSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT attd_no , in_dtm , out_dtm , attd_stat_cd FROM attendance WHERE emp_no = #{empNo} AND work_dt = CURRENT_DATE
